raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Warüm tam Egiptes
Kehnixem/ un winna Kalpeem/
un winna Leel-Kungeem / un
wiſſeem winna Laudun.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſeem / kas prett
Wakara-Puffi dſihwo/ un wiſ‐
ſeem Kehnixeem eekſch tahs
Senmes uz / un wiſſeem Keh‐
nixeem eekſch to Wilistru Sem‐
mes/ un Askaloxam/ un Basai/
un Efroam/ un teem Atlikku‐
cheem no Asdodas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Eedomam/ un Moabam/
un teem Ammona Behrxeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſeem Kehnixeem
no Tirus/ un wiſſeem Kehni‐
xeem no Zihdoma/ teem Kehni‐
xeem eekſch tahm Sallahin/ kas
wiannuffs Jubras irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Dedanam / un Teema‐
aam / un Bufeim/ un teem/ kas
ahtäs Malläs dſihwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſeem Kehnixeem no
Arabijas/ un wiſſeem Kehnixeem
no Wakara-Puffes/ kas Tuſf‐
nefi dſihwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſeem Kehnixeem no
Simrus/ un wiſſeem Kehnixeem
no Elama / un wiſſeem Kehni‐
xeem to Medern.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſeem Kehnixeem no
Seemeka-Puffes/ kas tuwn un
tahtu irr/ weenam tik labbi ka
ohtraim. Ir wiſſahm Semmes
Walstibahm/ kas wiſſ Sem‐
nes uraid / un tas Kehnixsch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tew buhs us teem faẓ‐
ziht: Ta fakka tas KUNGS
Zebaot / tas Iſraëla Deews:
Dserreet/ un peedserreetees/ un
weinjeet/ un erhteet semmē / ka
juhs atkaſ ne zettatees ta Soh‐
bina deht/ ko es juhsu Starpâ
fuhtitchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee leegſees to
Bikkeri notawas Rehkas neent/
un dsert/ tad buhs tew us teem
faẓziht: Ta fakka tas KUNGS Ze‐
baot: Teefchain juns buhs dsert.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo raugi/ es eeſahku
melzhiht eekſch ta Pilsfahta/ kas
pehz manna Wahrda irr no‐
taukts/ kuhtat juhs tad ar Ne‐
noseedsbu nenoseedsigi turretiz
Juhs ne tapfeet nenoseedsigi
turreti/ jo es fauzu to Sohbinu
pahr wiſſeem Semmes Eedsh‐
wotajeem/ fakka tas KUNGS
Zebaot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad buhs tew wiſſus
ſchohs Wahrdus teem fluddi‐
naht/ un us teem faẓziht: Tas
KUNGS ruhks no tahs Aug‐
stibas/ un pazels fawn Balſi no
tahs Mahju-Weetas tawas
Swehtibas / Wiṇsch ruhkdams
ruhks prett fawn Mahjas Wee‐
tu/ Wiṇsch Preeka-Dseefimu
dseedahs/ ka tee (Wiḥna-) Min‐
neji/ prett wiſſeem Semmes Ee‐
dshwotajeem/ ta Skanna ees
lihds Semmes Gallam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tam KUNGAM irr
Kilda ar teem Laudim/ Wiṇsch
turrehs Teefu ar wiſſu Mechsu /
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
